violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to continue to work in conjunction with pest control services to eliminate pest issue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The floors in the walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed on the floor in kitchen, storage room, and upstairs kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to work in conjunction with pest control services to eliminate pest issue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the dry storage room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
The ceiling by dry ingredients in kitchen was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2026
The floors in the walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2026

-The coving in the upstairs kitchen was observed in poor repair and/or missing. -Opening observed by stairwell leading to upstairs kitchen. -Opening observed in dry storage room New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

Hotdogs were observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Commercially processed hotdogs were reheated to a minimum of 135 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Floors in walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025
The doors to the toilet room in the basement hallway and in main kitchen are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. ceiling in kitchen by oven and alto sham 2. floors in walk-in cooler (repeat violation) 3. coving in hallway observed incomplete and/or in poor repair The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The window screen protector located in the 2nd kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints at the 2nd kitchen. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
There was standing water in water dispenser. Adequate draining shall be on place at the equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The floor at the walk-in cooler is in poor condition.. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

The floor in the 2nd kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

Food contact surfaces of can opener and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris and black and orange residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

Dishwasher located in the 2nd kitchen area was not in good repair. Unit was not in use at the time of the inspection. Person in charge is waiting for repaired. All equipment and utensils should be sent to main kitchen for washed, rinsed and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor at the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

The ceiling near to walk-in freezer/storage area in the main kitchen is in poor repair missing ceiling tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Dishwasher located in the 2nd kitchen area was not in good repair. Unit was not in used at the time of the inspection. Person in charge is waiting for repaired. All equipment and utensils should be sent to main kitchen for washed, rinsed and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live drain flies at the main kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Dishwasher located in the 2nd kitchen area was not in good repair. Unit was not in used at the time of the inspection. Person in charge is waiting for repaired. All equipment and utensils should be sent to main kitchen for washed, rinsed and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The floor in the storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Food contact surfaces of the can opener at the main kitchen was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The presence of insects are not controlled as evidenced by live domestic flies and small flies at the main kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
Dishwasher located in the 2nd floor area was not in good repair. All equipment and utensils should be sent to main kitchen for washed, rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the inside refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. - Floor at the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of dirt and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The floor in the main kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
